MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-07-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AMOUNT DEMANDED: $7207.05 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEPAOLI, JOSEPH P $7,207.05 PRINCIPAL, $293.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
